findings.title: Sql Template Literal
findings.description: SQL query constructed with string interpolation/concatenation. This is a SQL injection vulnerability -- use parameterized queries: db.query('SELECT ... WHERE id = $1', [id]). Even if the variable looks safe, it may be attacker-controlled.

findings.title: Ts Optional Chain Missing
findings.description: Deep property access without optional chaining. If any intermediate property is null or undefined, this will throw a TypeError. Use optional chaining (req?.query?.name) for safety, especially when dealing with API responses or database results that may have missing fields.

findings.title: Ts Optional Chain Missing
findings.description: Deep property access without optional chaining. If any intermediate property is null or undefined, this will throw a TypeError. Use optional chaining (req?.query?.name) for safety, especially when dealing with API responses or database results that may have missing fields.

findings.title: Ts Optional Chain Missing
findings.description: Deep property access without optional chaining. If any intermediate property is null or undefined, this will throw a TypeError. Use optional chaining (req?.params?.id) for safety, especially when dealing with API responses or database results that may have missing fields.
